listitem.para: Whether ipsec add --autoall (run when &pluto; starts and whenever ipsec.conf is reloaded) should reconcile the running connection table against the configuration rather than only adding to it. When enabled, connections whose definition is unchanged are left in place (preserving their established SAs instead of being torn down and rebuilt), and connections that no longer appear in the configuration are swept away. When disabled, --autoall is additive only: removed connections linger and unchanged connections are re-added on every reload.
